title: wedelia aurantiaca
intro: Wedelia aurantiaca, also known as the Wedelia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia aurantiaca include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and gastrointestinal problems.
